title: Craft Metrics

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_session_stats" and r._field == "server_age_days") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_session_stats" and r._field == "current_streak_days") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_session_stats" and r._field == "longest_session_seconds") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_session_stats" and r._field == "total_sessions") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_session" and r._field == "duration_seconds") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_session") |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 20)
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and r._field == "playtime_hours")
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and r._field == "blocks_mined_total") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and r._field == "mobs_killed_total") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and r._field == "deaths") |> last()

panels.title: Activity rates
panels.description: Blocks mined and items picked up per hour played, from the delta between scrapes.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_derived" and (r._field == "blocks_mined_per_hour" or r._field == "items_picked_per_hour"))

from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_block" and r._field == "count") |> group(columns: ["block"]) |> last() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 10) |> keep(columns: ["block", "_value"])

from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_mob" and r._field == "count") |> group(columns: ["mob"]) |> last() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 10) |> keep(columns: ["mob", "_value"])
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and (r._field == "damage_dealt" or r._field == "damage_taken"))

from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and (r._field == "distance_walk_m" or r._field == "distance_sprint_m" or r._field == "distance_elytra_m" or r._field == "distance_minecart_m" or r._field == "distance_boat_m" or r._field == "distance_horse_m")) |> group(columns: ["_field"]) |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_station" and r._field == "count") |> group(columns: ["station"]) |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_automation" and r._field == "count") |> group(columns: ["action"]) |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and r._field == "jumps") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_other" and r._field == "count" and r.action == "traded_with_villager") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_other" and r._field == "count" and r.action == "animals_bred") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_other" and r._field == "count" and r.action == "fish_caught") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_other" and r._field == "count" and r.action == "enchant_item") |> last()
from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_other" and r._field == "count" and r.action == "sleep_in_bed") |> last()

panels.title: Distance by terrain
panels.description: Movement distance for the more technical travel types, in meters.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and (r._field == "distance_crouch_m" or r._field == "distance_swim_m" or r._field == "distance_fall_m" or r._field == "distance_climb_m" or r._field == "distance_walk_on_water_m" or r._field == "distance_walk_under_water_m" or r._field == "distance_fly_m")) |> group(columns: ["_field"]) |> last()

panels.title: Damage mitigation
panels.description: Lifetime damage the player absorbed, blocked with a shield, resisted, or absorbed while dealing it.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_summary" and (r._field == "damage_absorbed" or r._field == "damage_blocked_by_shield" or r._field == "damage_resisted" or r._field == "damage_dealt_absorbed")) |> group(columns: ["_field"]) |> last()

panels.title: Containers opened
panels.description: Times the player opened each type of storage container.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -1y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_stats_container" and r._field == "count") |> group(columns: ["container"]) |> last() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> keep(columns: ["container", "_value"])

panels.title: Overload events (24h)
panels.description: Times the server fell behind and skipped ticks in the last 24h, from vanilla's "Can't keep up" warning.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_server_health" and r._field == "overload_events") |> sum()

panels.title: Worst lag (24h)
panels.description: Largest amount the server was running behind in the last 24h.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_server_health" and r._field == "max_ms_behind") |> max()

panels.title: Startup time
panels.description: How long the server took to finish loading on its last start.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_server_health" and r._field == "startup_seconds") |> last()

panels.title: Restarts (7d)
panels.description: Number of times the server (re)started in the last 7 days.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_server_health" and r._field == "server_starts") |> sum()

panels.title: Server lag
panels.description: Milliseconds the server was running behind per scrape (0 when keeping up).

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_server_health" and r._field == "max_ms_behind")

panels.title: Ticks skipped
panels.description: Server ticks skipped per scrape while catching up after an overload.

targets.query: from(bucket: "minecraft") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mc_server_health" and r._field == "ticks_skipped")

description: Gameplay stats for a single-player Minecraft server, collected by the craft-metrics exporter.
